EmailTemplate.name: Experience Cloud: Forgot Password FIMBY
EmailTemplate.subject: Your new FIMBY password.
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Reset your FIMBY password
Hi {!Receiving_User.FirstName},
We received a request to reset your FIMBY password. Use this link to choose a new password:
{!Community_Url}
Thanks, Team FIMBY
Family In My Backyard
